test_description: Validates that EA rejects new trades when daily loss exceeds MAX_DAILY_LOSS_PERCENT limit

signals.event_title: Reference Signal: Set up for loss simulation
signals.setup_note: This position will be manually closed at a loss to simulate daily loss

signals.event_title: Signal After Loss Exceeded - Should Be Rejected
signals.rationale: Attempt new trade when daily loss limit exceeded

test_procedure: Manually open and close a losing position to incur -$1,050 loss (10.5% of balance)
This ensures daily loss = -10.5%, exceeding -10% limit
Check EA log for daily loss rejection message
Verify EA stops trading until new trading day
success_criteria: After incurring >10% daily loss, signal 2 is rejected
EA log contains daily loss limit rejection message
Trading halts until loss is recovered or new day begins
Message includes actual loss amount and limit
edge_cases: Test exactly at limit (10%) - should accept
Test just below limit (9.9%) - should accept
Test just above limit (10.1%) - should reject
Test multiple small losses accumulating to exceed limit
Test at end of trading day vs start of new day
manual_setup_steps: 2. Set MAX_DAILY_LOSS_PERCENT to 10 in EA parameters
4. Send first signal to establish baseline
5. Manually incur $1,050+ loss (e.g., close a position at loss)
6. Record current equity and daily loss in log
